decisions.name: Decision_1
decisions.label: STEP 1: Found Account with same email?

rules.name: Yes_Found_Account_with_same_email
rules.label: Yes, Found Account with same email

decisions.name: Found_the_Lead_with_the_same_email
decisions.label: STEP 5: Found the Lead with the same email?

rules.name: Yes_Found_the_Lead_with_the_same_email
rules.label: Yes, Found the Lead with the same email

decisions.name: STEP_2_Found_Duplicate_Policy_with_same_Product_Type
decisions.label: STEP 2: Found Duplicate Policy with same Product Type?

rules.name: Yes_Found_Duplicate_Policy_with_same_Product_Type
rules.label: Yes, Found Duplicate Policy with same Product Type

decisions.name: STEP_2_Found_Policy_with_the_same_Customer_Email
decisions.label: STEP 2: Found Policy with the same Customer Email?

rules.name: Yes_Found_Policy_with_the_same_Customer_Email
rules.label: Yes, Found Policy with the same Customer Email?

decisions.name: STEP_2_Triggering_Product_Type_Contains_Policy_Product
decisions.label: STEP 2: Triggering Product Type Contains Policy Product?

rules.name: Yes_STEP_2_Triggering_Product_Type_Contains_Policy_Product
rules.label: Yes, STEP 2: Triggering Product Type Contains Policy Product?

rules.name: Yes_Found_Lead_Source_Record
rules.label: Yes, Found Lead Source Record?

rules.name: Yes_guest_user
rules.label: Yes, guest user

rules.name: Yes_Proceed
rules.label: Yes, Proceed

rules.name: Yes_Found_Duplicate_Opportunity
rules.label: Yes, Found Duplicate Opportunity

decisions.name: STEP_3_Found_Lost_Opportunity_within_30_days
decisions.label: STEP 3: Found Lost Opportunity within 30 days?

rules.name: Yes_Found_Lost_Opportunity_within_30_days
rules.label: Yes, Found Lost Opportunity within 30 days

decisions.name: STEP_3_Opportunity_has_same_Product_Type_as_Triggering_Lead
decisions.label: STEP 3: Opportunity has same Product Type as Triggering Lead

rules.name: yes_Opportunity_has_same_Product_Type_as_Triggering_Lead
rules.conditionLogic: 1 OR ((2 OR 3 OR 4 OR 5) AND (6 OR 7 OR 8 OR 9))
rules.label: Yes, Opportunity has same Product Type as Triggering Lead

rules.name: Copy_1_of_Yes_Found_Duplicate_Opportunity
rules.label: Yes, Found Duplicate Opportunity

rules.name: Yes_Found_Open_Opportunity
rules.label: Yes, Found Open Opportunity

decisions.name: STEP_4_Opportunity_has_same_Product_Type_as_Triggering_Lead
decisions.label: STEP 4: Opportunity has same Product Type as Triggering Lead

rules.name: Yes_Opportunity_has_same_Product_Type_as_Triggering_Lead1
rules.conditionLogic: 1 OR ((2 OR 3 OR 4 OR 5) AND (6 OR 7 OR 8 OR 9))
rules.label: Yes, Opportunity has same Product Type as Triggering Lead

decisions.name: STEP_6_Found_Lead_with_the_Same_Email_and_Product_Type
decisions.label: STEP 6: Found Lead with the Same Email and Product Type?

rules.name: Yes_Found_Lead_with_the_Same_Email_and_Product_Type_Unqualified_within_30_Days
rules.label: Yes, Found Lead with the Same Email and Product Type (Unqualified within 30 Days)

rules.name: Yes_Found_Lead_with_the_Same_Email_and_Product_Type_Not_Unqualified_and_Qualifie
rules.label: Yes, Found Lead with the Same Email and Product Type (Not Unqualified and Qualified)

rules.name: Copy_1_of_Yes_guest_user
rules.label: Yes, guest user

rules.name: Yes_Owned_by_Queue
rules.label: Yes, Owned by Queue

rules.name: Yes_Product_Type_already_exist
rules.label: Yes, Product Type already exist

rules.name: Copy_2_of_Yes_guest_user
rules.label: Yes, guest user

rules.name: Yes_Product_Type_already_exist_Step_8
rules.label: Yes, Product Type already exist

decisions.name: Triggering_Product_Type_Contains_Lead_with_Same_Email
decisions.label: STEP 6: Triggering Product Type Contains Lead with Same Email?

rules.name: Yes_Triggering_Product_Type_Contains_Lead_with_Same_Email
rules.conditionLogic: 1 OR ((2 OR 3 OR 4 OR 5) AND (6 OR 7 OR 8 OR 9))
rules.label: Yes, Triggering Product Type Contains Lead with Same Email
